introSection: Wood Express is a wooden hybrid roller coaster located at Parc Saint Paul in Saint-Paul, Hauts-de-France, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Wood Express was revealed on October 29, 2017. The ride began testing with riders on June 30, 2018. It then officially opened on July 1.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Wood Express is a hybrid roller coaster, with wooden track and steel structure.

fullText:
Wood Express is a wooden hybrid roller coaster located at Parc Saint Paul in Saint-Paul, Hauts-de-France, France.

Wood Express was revealed on October 29, 2017. The ride began testing with riders on June 30, 2018. It then officially opened on July 1.

Wood Express is a hybrid roller coaster, with wooden track and steel structure.
